overall.description: Game engine footage depicting a vehicle driving along a rural dirt road toward a gated Mediterranean-style compound. The camera passes through a barrier gate onto a formal brick driveway lined with tall cypress trees under bright sunny skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt road with scattered palms and utility poles

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along the unpaved road toward a distant walled compound

entered.detail: unpaved dusty road with tire tracks running through rural landscape
wooden power pole with multiple cross-arms and wires running alongside the road
group of tall palm trees with green fronds against blue sky
distant yellow stucco wall marking the boundary of a private property

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person drive along a wide rural dirt road under clear blue skies. Utility poles line the left side while palm trees and scattered bushes dot the landscape. The camera approaches a yellow-walled compound in the distance with no other vehicles or pedestrians present.

scene_state.functional_zone: gated entrance to private estate with yellow stucco architecture

events.description: approaching the compound entrance where dirt road transitions to brick pavement
passing through the red and white striped barrier gate with stop sign

agents.ego_description: slowing to navigate through the gated entrance onto the estate grounds

entered.detail: red and white striped horizontal barrier arm with circular stop sign
tall yellow plaster wall with decorative elements marking the property boundary
small yellow building with terracotta tile roof adjacent to the gate

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches the estate entrance where the dirt road gives way to brick paving. A yellow stucco wall and guard building frame the gate with its red-and-white barrier arm. The camera passes through the gate as the landscape transitions from open rural road to a more manicured estate setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: formal cypress-lined avenue with brick driveway

events.description: entering the tree-lined avenue with tall cypress trees flanking both sides

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the straight brick driveway between rows of tall cypress trees

entered.detail: tall narrow evergreen trees forming a formal allée along both sides of the driveway
red brick paved surface with patterned layout replacing the dirt road
well-maintained green grass verges between the driveway and tree lines

segments.scene_description: Having passed through the gate, the camera travels along a formal brick driveway lined with tall cypress trees creating a natural corridor. The setting shifts from rural openness to an enclosed, manicured estate avenue with dense vegetation framing the path ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transforms from an open rural landscape into the secluded, manicured grounds of a Mediterranean estate. It begins along a wide dirt road under clear blue skies, passing utility poles and scattered palm trees as a yellow-walled compound appears in the distance. As the vehicle approaches the entrance, the dirt terrain gives way to brick paving, and the camera glides past a guard building and a red-and-white barrier arm. The scene then shifts from rural openness to an enclosed estate avenue, moving through the gate and into a formal corridor of tall cypress trees. Finally, the view settles into a structured driveway where dense vegetation frames the path ahead.
